contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 30
- Description: Resolve stale tokenomics PR #278 via clean cherry-pick (#279)
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/279
  
  Details:
  Resolve stale tokenomics PR #278 — cherry-pick clean SCHEMA col J fix
  
  PR #278 ("ai/restock addresses ...") was in DIRTY/CONFLICTING state. Inspection
  showed it had branched off an old main (merge-base 2fcfa8d, the Shipment Ledger
  Listing col A docs commit) and accumulated 7 commits — six of which were
  duplicates of work that subsequently landed on main via PRs #271–#277 under
  different SHAs (snapshot_managed_ledgers.py, routeStripeCheckoutPurchasesToLedgers,
  Asset Receipts dedup, currency conversion, etc.). The diff against current main
  showed PR #278 would have **deleted** 84 lines of snapshot_managed_ledgers.py,
  149 lines of currency_conversion_processing.gs, and 77 lines of
  CURRENCY_CONVERSION_IMPLEMENTATION.md — reverting real recent work.
  
  The only genuinely new commit on the branch was b551262 — a 1-line SCHEMA.md
  addition documenting Agroverse Partners column J 'address' as the canonical
  ship-to for the Restock Recommender (Shipping Planner API parses into
  street1/city/state/zip/country; falls back to legacy 'Partner addresses' sheet).
  
  Resolution: cherry-picked b551262 onto a fresh branch off current main, opened
  TrueSightDAO/tokenomics#279, squash-merged it, and closed #278 with an
  explanatory comment pointing at #279. No reversion of unrelated work, clean
  history.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 50.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
